zh.Walton on Thames, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞沃爾頓--坦斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall於大約1345年出生在英國英格蘭爾諾波利時，他的父親Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall29歲，母親Elizabeth Sandbach28歲。他於大約1363年與Anna (or Jane) Leigh在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年7月20日在英國英格蘭素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall于大约1345年出生在英国英格兰爾諾波利时，他的父亲Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall29岁，母亲Elizabeth Sandbach28岁。他于大约1363年与Anna (or Jane) Leigh在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年7月20日在英国英格兰素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall was born about 1345, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Sandbach, was 28. He married Anna (or Jane) Leigh about 1363, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 20 July 1404, in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall est né environ 1345, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sandbach, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Anna (or Jane) Leigh environ 1363, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1404, à Addington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall um 1345 in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Sandbach 28. Er hat um 1363 in England, United Kingdom Anna (or Jane) Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juli 1404 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall è nato il circa 1345 nel Norbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Sandbach, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Anna (or Jane) Leigh circa 1363, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1404, nel Addington, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Legh of Booths Hallが約1345年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John III Legh of Booths Hallは29歳，母Elizabeth Sandbachは28歳であった。約1363年にイギリスイギリスでAnna (or Jane) Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年7月20日にイギリスイギリススリーアッドイントンで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall(이)가 대략 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Sandbach(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1363년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Anna (or Jane) Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 7월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 애딩턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall nasceu aproximadamente 1345, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sandbach, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna (or Jane) Leigh aproximadamente 1363, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1404, em Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall родился около 1345 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sandbach, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna (or Jane) Leigh около 1363 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 июля 1404 г. в местности аддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Legh of Booths Hall nació aproximadamente 1345, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John III Legh of Booths Hall, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Sandbach, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Anna (or Jane) Leigh aproximadamente 1363, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1404, en Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
